0x4e71d92d.name: claim()
0x4e71d92d.reason: user fee claim: msg.sender's accrued veCRV fee share

0x1e83409a.name: claim(address)
0x1e83409a.reason: user fee claim for a specific account (on_behalf_of)

0x7b935a23.name: claim_many(address[20])
0x7b935a23.reason: batch keeper claim for up to 20 accounts — beneficiary list not modeled by ClaimRewards; claim()/claim(address) cover the user surface

0x811a40fe.name: checkpoint_token()
0x811a40fe.reason: keeper maintenance (fee accounting checkpoint), not a pre-sign value/permission action

0x89afcb44.name: burn(address)
0x89afcb44.reason: deposit fees into the distributor (integration/admin), not an end-user claim
